programme.title: The Killing Season
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel investigate the death of a young escort, then probe similarities between a serial murder case in Atlantic City, N.J., and the killings at Gilgo Beach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Killing Season
programme.sub-title: A Darkness on the Edge of Town
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel continue their hunt for the Eastbound Strangler; a sex worker believes she encountered the killer; a call with an anonymous Web detective sends Josh and Rachel to a site where the four women may have been killed.

programme.title: The Killing Season
programme.desc: The bodies of 10 murder victims tied to the sex trade are discovered along a highway, and the identity of the killer remains a mystery five years later.

programme.title: The Killing Season
programme.desc: A profiler reveals that two active serial killers are responsible for the 10 dead bodies, prompting Josh and Rachel to look into a mysterious series of torso killings.

programme.title: The Killing Season
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel investigate the death of a young escort, then probe similarities between a serial murder case in Atlantic City, N.J., and the killings at Gilgo Beach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Killing Season
programme.sub-title: A Darkness on the Edge of Town
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel continue their hunt for the Eastbound Strangler; a sex worker believes she encountered the killer; a call with an anonymous Web detective sends Josh and Rachel to a site where the four women may have been killed.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Vanessa Gay recounts her escape from Anthony Sowell in Cleveland, Ohio; detective Lemmy Griffin and prosecutor Rick Bombik walk through this murderer's capture and sentencing.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In November 1988, 27-year-old Enietra Margette is walking to a party in South Los Angeles, when a neatly dressed man offers her a ride; soon after she gets into the car, the driver, Lonnie Franklin, shoots the passenger point-blank in the chest.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Morgan Rowan describes how she was brutally attacked in 1968 by Rodney Alcala during a party at his Hollywood home; three weeks later, Alcala would abduct and attack 8-year-old Tali Shapiro, who describes her chilling assault in her own words.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In Nov. 2011, 48-year-old Scott Davis thought he was on his way to a gig as a farm caretaker, a job he had secured on Craigslist; however, it was a murderous trap laid by a psychopathic serial killer named Richard Beasley.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.desc: With a taste of success and the lure of easy money, Thelma started transporting cocaine and heroin between Los Angeles and Philadelphia.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.sub-title: The Mayor of Harlem: Alberto "Alpo" Martinez
programme.desc: The rise and fall of Albert "Alpo" Martinez, dubbed the "Mayor of Harlem.".

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.sub-title: The First Kingpin: Juan Raul Garza
programme.desc: The federal government seeks the death penalty for convicted murderer and drug kingpin Juan Raul Garza, who made millions of dollars smuggling marijuana into the United States from Mexico.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.desc: Thompson rose to the top of the cocaine trade; she was released from prison in 2005 and is now an evangelical minister.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: As leader of Murder, Inc., Albert Anastasia became one of the most vicious and feared mob bosses of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Heroin kingpin Leroy "Nicky" Barnes turns government informant, destroying the drug trafficking empire he took so long to build.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: "Big Paul" Castellano serves as a boss of the Gambino crime family during the '70s and '80s, overseeing rackets in construction, pornography and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: "Mad Sam" DeStefano had a three-decade reign as a juice loan lender and sadistic enforcer with the notorious Chicago Outfit.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Virginia Hill, Arlyne Brickman and Karen Hill are mob ladies with looks that could kill and the connections to take out anyone in their way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Philadelphia mob boss Nicky Scarfo's paranoia, volatility and treachery ultimately lead to his demise.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Heroin kingpin Frank Lucas dominated the Harlem drug market from 1968 to 1975, before being busted for conspiracy to distribute heroin and serving 5 year of his 70-year sentence.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Gun-for-hire Joe "Mad Dog" Sullivan tries to hide his criminal activities from his family, but an addiction to drugs, betrayal and murder would prove his undoing.

programme.title: Jonestown: The Women Behind the Massacre
programme.desc: Four women belonging to cult leader Jim Jones' inner circle help plan the 1978 Jonestown massacre in Guyana, which leaves more than 900 people dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Warren Jeffs: Prophet of Evil
programme.desc: Current and former members of the FLDS discuss controversial church president Warren Jeffs, who was convicted of two felony counts of child sexual assault in 2011.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A mother is jammed into a snow-filled garbage can by her ex-husband; a woman struggles to escape a pile of bodies after an elevator malfunction; three men attack a bar owner as part of a gang initiation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A store manager and his staff are shot by two killers; a young man has both his arms torn off in an accident; a young girl is kidnapped by a serial killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: Two women fight for their lives when an attacker ambushes them on a mountain trail; two men survive 14 hours adrift at sea.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A man is taken hostage by Marxist rebels; two girls are abducted while walking home from school.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: Two participants struggle with the decision to leave the program early, while the others attempt to keep their wits as they finish the back half of their time in the Fulton County Jail.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: Matt wrestles with the most devastating moment of his life; Alan gets a mysterious new cellmate; the inmates throw an unforgettable birthday party for Angele.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: After an emotional breakdown, one participant is not sure he can continue in the program; he expands his meth investigation.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: A participant gets removed from the program after intentionally breaking their cover with an inmate; Stephanie fears that Gabrielle will not keep a secret; Alan tries to buy meth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: Col. Adger races the clock to safely remove all the participants from the Fulton County Jail.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: Newly elected sheriff Mark Lamb sends six volunteers into the Pinal County Detention Center on a mission to uncover valuable intelligence about the gangs, drugs and operational issues that plague his facility.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: With three participants in the jail and two more on their way in, Sheriff Lamb's mission-based program is off to the races.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: With all seven participants embedded in the facility, some struggle to maintain their distance from one another; one participant threatens to bring the whole program to an abrupt end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: As the participants begin to focus on their missions, some find early success while others are met with immediate interference; Sheriff Lamb is forced to make a tough decision.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: The participants are tested by thieves and the racial politics of jail, forcing them to become either targets and victims, or threats and aggressors.

programme.title: 60 Days In
programme.desc: David climbs the ranks in the pod and struggles to remember what side he is on; Abner is tested when one of his own commits an offense; the women suspect that they are being unfairly targeted by the DOs.

programme.desc: More than halfway through their time in jail, the participants struggle to make progress on their missions; as pod drama boils over, some hit their breaking point.
